result.summary: Wikiloc exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.wikiloc.com/mcp` with SSE transport and no authentication; its help center states there is no public developer API, and no GraphQL API or CLI was found.
result.description: Wikiloc is an outdoor trail platform where people discover, record, share, and download GPS routes for activities like hiking, cycling, and running. It also offers mobile apps and premium features for navigation and route planning.
